name: Around the World: Travel to Brazil
short_description: Explore sunny Brazil on an exciting journey! Visit famous waterfalls, Amazon jungles, and Rio's beaches. Find hidden objects and collect souvenirs. Special rewards await the most attentive travelers!
detailed_description:
Brazil: Tropical Adventure

Get ready for an unforgettable journey through the sunniest country in South America! An exciting adventure awaits you where you can examine Brazilian landmarks in minute detail, find hidden objects, and collect unique souvenirs.

Your route will take you through Brazil's most famous places: from the mighty Iguazu Falls to the golden beaches of Copacabana, from the mysterious Amazon jungles to the modern streets of São Paulo. Each location is a new story and an opportunity to learn more about the culture and nature of this amazing country.

Collector's Edition

A special edition with additional content is available for true travel connoisseurs:

• 10 new locations with Brazilian landscapes
• 22 additional mini-games of various genres
• Collection of thematic desktop wallpapers
• Music player with national motifs
• Catalog of exclusive souvenirs

Discover the magic of Brazil, its rhythms and colors, and become a true expert of this amazing country!

After visiting all locations and collecting the complete souvenir collection, you'll be honored at a special award ceremony during a virtual Brazilian carnival. You'll receive the title of "Honorary Traveler" and get exclusive access to additional materials about Brazil.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Russian
*languages with full audio support
